\tzpentry{ID4156}{Pressure Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4156 introduces Pressure Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} P_{\text{EM}} = -\frac{1}{2} \varepsilon_0 E^2 + \frac{1}{2\mu_0} B^2 \end{equation}
